name: Shark Evo Power System Cordless Stick Vacuum
pros: Strong multi-surface suction with motorized brush head for carpets
Lightweight design (under 2.5kg) makes stairs and cleaning easier
Well-reviewed after-sales support in Japan with genuine parts availability
cons: Battery life drops significantly in high-power mode (around 20 minutes)
Instruction manual is Japanese-heavy; English support limited for troubleshooting
shortDescription: Lightweight cordless stick vacuum with motorized head and strong suction.
review: The Shark Evo Power is a solid mid-range option for expats seeking a familiar Western brand. The lightweight frame and motorized brush head excel on Japanese tatami and hardwood, though battery longevity in turbo mode may frustrate those with larger homes. At ¥33,275 with accessories included, it's competitively priced against Dyson but with fewer tech bells.
